type BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Description stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

MaxIterations int64о‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

Rubric BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEventRubricUnionо‚љ

Rubric for grading the quality of an outcome.

One of the following:

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

Error BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEventErrorUnionо‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

Message stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

RetryStatus BetaManagedAgentsUnknownErrorRetryStatusUnionо‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetryingTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhaustedTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUnknownErrorTypeо‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEventTypeо‚љ

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

Result BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultо‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultAllow BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResult = "allow"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultDeny BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResult = "deny"о‚љ

ToolUseID stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventTypeо‚љ

DenyMessage stringо‚љOptional

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Input map[string, any]о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

Name stringо‚љ

Name of the custom tool being called.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEventTypeо‚љ

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

оЂЄ

Type BetaManagedAgentsTextBlockTypeо‚љ

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsAgentMessageEventTypeо‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent invokes a tool provided by an MCP server.

Unique identifier for this event.

Input map[string, any]о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

MCPServerName stringо‚љ

Name of the MCP server providing the tool.

Name stringо‚љ

Name of the MCP tool being used.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

EvaluatedPermission BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionо‚љOptional

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionAllow BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermission = "allow"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionAsk BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermission = "ask"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionDeny BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermission = "deny"о‚љ

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

type BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent invokes a built-in agent tool.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Input map[string, any]о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

Name stringо‚љ

Name of the agent tool being used.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

EvaluatedPermission BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionо‚љOptional

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionAllow BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEventEvaluatedPermission = "allow"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionAsk BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEventEvaluatedPermission = "ask"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionDeny BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEventEvaluatedPermission = "deny"о‚љ

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

type BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

Error BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEventErrorUnionо‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

Message stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

RetryStatus BetaManagedAgentsUnknownErrorRetryStatusUnionо‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetryingTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhaustedTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminalTypeо‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsUnknownErrorTypeо‚љ

One of the following:

type BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

EventIDs []stringо‚љ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresActionTypeо‚љ

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

AgentName stringо‚љ

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadCreatedEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Explanation stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

OutcomeEvaluationStartID stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Result stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

Usage [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

CacheCreationInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

CacheReadInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

InputTokens int64о‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

OutputTokens int64о‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

Speed BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedо‚љOptional

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedStandard BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "standard"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedFast BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Description stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

MaxIterations int64о‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type BetaManagedAgentsModel stringо‚љ

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeFable5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-fable-5"о‚љ

Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_8 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-8"о‚љ

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_7 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-7"о‚љ

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_6 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-6"о‚љ

Most intelligent model for building agents and coding

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeSonnet4\_6 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-sonnet-4-6"о‚љ

Best combination of speed and intelligence

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeHaiku4\_5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-haiku-4-5"о‚љ

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeHaiku4\_5\_20251001 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"о‚љ

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-5"о‚љ

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_5\_20251101 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-5-20251101"о‚љ

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeSonnet4\_5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-sonnet-4-5"о‚љ

High-performance model for agents and coding

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeSonnet4\_5\_20250929 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"о‚љ

High-performance model for agents and coding

stringо‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelRequestEndEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Emitted when a model request completes.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

IsError boolо‚љ

Whether the model request resulted in an error.

ModelRequestStartID stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.model_request_start` event.

оЂЄ

ModelUsage [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

CacheCreationInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

CacheReadInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

InputTokens int64о‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

OutputTokens int64о‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

Speed BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedо‚љOptional

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedStandard BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "standard"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedFast BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "fast"о‚љ

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelRequestEndEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

CacheReadInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

InputTokens int64о‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

OutputTokens int64о‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

Speed BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedо‚љOptional

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedStandard BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "standard"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedFast BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Explanation stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

OutcomeEvaluationStartID stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Result stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

Usage [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

CacheCreationInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

CacheReadInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

InputTokens int64о‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

OutputTokens int64о‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

Speed BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedо‚љOptional

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedStandard BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "standard"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedFast BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEventTypeо‚љ

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

Result BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultо‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultAllow BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResult = "allow"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultDeny BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResult = "deny"о‚љ

ToolUseID stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventTypeо‚љ

DenyMessage stringо‚љOptional

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

type BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultBlock struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A block containing a web search result.

оЂЄ

Citations [BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultCitations](api/beta.md)о‚љ

Citation settings for a search result.

Enabled boolо‚љ

Whether citations are enabled for this search result.

оЂЄ

Content [][BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultContent](api/beta.md)о‚љ

Array of text content blocks from the search result.

Text stringо‚љ

The text content.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultContentTypeо‚љ

Source stringо‚љ

The URL source of the search result.

Title stringо‚љ

The title of the search result.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultBlockTypeо‚љ

IsError boolо‚љOptional

Whether the tool execution resulted in an error.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

Routes this result to a subagent thread. Copy from the `agent.custom_tool_use` event's `session_thread_id`.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Input map[string, any]о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

Name stringо‚љ

Name of the custom tool being called.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEventTypeо‚љ

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsAgentMessageEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An agent response event in the session conversation.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

Content [][BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock](api/beta.md)о‚љ

Array of text blocks comprising the agent response.

Text stringо‚љ

The text content.

Type BetaManagedAgentsTextBlockTypeо‚љ

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsAgentMessageEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsAgentThinkingEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Indicates the agent is making forward progress via extended thinking. A progress signal, not a content carrier.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsAgentThinkingEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent invokes a tool provided by an MCP server.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Input map[string, any]о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

MCPServerName stringо‚љ

Name of the MCP server providing the tool.

Name stringо‚љ

Name of the MCP tool being used.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

EvaluatedPermission BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionо‚љOptional

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionAllow BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermission = "allow"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionAsk BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermission = "ask"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermissionDeny BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEventEvaluatedPermission = "deny"о‚љ

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

оЂЄ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

Error BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEventErrorUnionо‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

Message stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

RetryStatus BetaManagedAgentsUnknownErrorRetryStatusUnionо‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetryingTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhaustedTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminalTypeо‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Explanation stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

OutcomeEvaluationStartID stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Result stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

Usage [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

CacheCreationInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

CacheReadInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

InputTokens int64о‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

OutputTokens int64о‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

Speed BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedо‚љOptional

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedStandard BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "standard"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedFast BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Description stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

MaxIterations int64о‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

Rubric BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEventRubricUnionо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type BetaManagedAgentsModel stringо‚љ

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeFable5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-fable-5"о‚љ

Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_8 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-8"о‚љ

Best combination of speed and intelligence

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeHaiku4\_5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-haiku-4-5"о‚љ

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeHaiku4\_5\_20251001 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"о‚љ

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-5"о‚љ

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_5\_20251101 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-5-20251101"о‚љ

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeSonnet4\_5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-sonnet-4-5"о‚љ

stringо‚љ

Speed BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigSpeedо‚љOptional

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigSpeedStandard BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigSpeed = "standard"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigSpeedFast BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigSpeed = "fast"о‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A mid-conversation system message event. Carries system-role content that is appended to the session as a `role: "system"` turn.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

Content [][BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md)о‚љ

System content blocks. Text-only.

Text stringо‚љ

The text content.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlockTypeо‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventTypeо‚љ

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParamsResp struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

оЂЄ

Content [][BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md)о‚љ

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

Text stringо‚љ

The text content.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlockTypeо‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParamsTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Regular text content.

Text stringо‚љ

The text content.

Type BetaManagedAgentsTextBlockTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsTextRubric struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Rubric content provided inline as text.

Content stringо‚љ

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown вЂ” the grader treats it as freeform text.

Type BetaManagedAgentsTextRubricTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsTextRubricParamsResp struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Rubric content provided inline as text.

Content stringо‚љ

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown вЂ” the grader treats it as freeform text. Maximum 262144 characters.

Type BetaManagedAgentsTextRubricParamsTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

Message stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

RetryStatus BetaManagedAgentsUnknownErrorRetryStatusUnionо‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetryingTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhaustedTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminalTypeо‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsUnknownErrorTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Description stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

MaxIterations int64о‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEventTypeо‚љ

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

type BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

Result BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultо‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultAllow BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResult = "allow"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultDeny BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResult = "deny"о‚љ

ToolUseID stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventTypeо‚љ

DenyMessage stringо‚љOptional

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParamsResp struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Parameters for confirming or denying a tool execution request.

оЂЄ

Result BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParamsResultо‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParamsResultAllow BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParamsResult = "allow"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParamsResultDeny BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParamsResult = "deny"о‚љ

ToolUseID stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParamsTypeо‚љ

DenyMessage stringо‚љOptional

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

оЂЄ

#### BetaSessionsResources

##### [Add Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/add.md)

client.Beta.Sessions.Resources.Add(ctx, sessionID, params) (\*[BetaManagedAgentsFileResource](api/beta.md), error)

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources

##### [List Session Resources](api/beta/sessions/resources/list.md)

client.Beta.Sessions.Resources.List(ctx, sessionID, params) (\*PageCursor[[BetaManagedAgentsSessionResourceUnion](api/beta.md)], error)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources

##### [Get Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/retrieve.md)

client.Beta.Sessions.Resources.Get(ctx, resourceID, params) (\*[BetaSessionResourceGetResponseUnion](api/beta.md), error)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources/{resource\_id}

##### [Update Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/update.md)

client.Beta.Sessions.Resources.Update(ctx, resourceID, params) (\*[BetaSessionResourceUpdateResponseUnion](api/beta.md), error)

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources/{resource\_id}

##### [Delete Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/delete.md)

client.Beta.Sessions.Resources.Delete(ctx, resourceID, params) (\*[BetaManagedAgentsDeleteSessionResource](api/beta.md), error)

DELETE/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources/{resource\_id}

type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResource struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A memory store attached to an agent session.

MemoryStoreID stringо‚љ

The memory store ID (memstore\_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.

Type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

Access BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceAccessо‚љOptional

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceAccessReadWrite BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceAccess = "read\_write"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceAccessReadOnly BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceAccess = "read\_only"о‚љ

Description stringо‚љOptional

Description of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Rendered into the agent's system prompt. Empty string when the store has no description.

Instructions stringо‚љOptional

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

MountPath stringо‚љOptional

Filesystem path where the store is mounted in the session container, e.g. /mnt/memory/user-preferences. Derived from the store's name. Output-only.

Name stringо‚љOptional

Display name of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Later edits to the store's name do not propagate to this resource.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSessionResourceUnion interface{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A memory store attached to an agent session.

One of the following:

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceAccessReadWrite BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceAccess = "read\_write"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceAccessReadOnly BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceAccess = "read\_only"о‚љ

Description stringо‚љOptional

Description of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Rendered into the agent's system prompt. Empty string when the store has no description.

Instructions stringо‚љOptional

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

MountPath stringо‚љOptional

Filesystem path where the store is mounted in the session container, e.g. /mnt/memory/user-preferences. Derived from the store's name. Output-only.

Name stringо‚љOptional

Display name of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Later edits to the store's name do not propagate to this resource.

#### BetaSessionsThreads

##### [List Session Threads](api/beta/sessions/threads/list.md)

client.Beta.Sessions.Threads.List(ctx, sessionID, params) (\*PageCursor[[BetaManagedAgentsSessionThread](api/beta.md)], error)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/threads

##### [Get Session Thread](api/beta/sessions/threads/retrieve.md)

client.Beta.Sessions.Threads.Get(ctx, threadID, params) (\*[BetaManagedAgentsSessionThread](api/beta.md), error)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/threads/{thread\_id}

##### [Archive Session Thread](api/beta/sessions/threads/archive.md)

client.Beta.Sessions.Threads.Archive(ctx, threadID, params) (\*[BetaManagedAgentsSessionThread](api/beta.md), error)

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/threads/{thread\_id}/archive

type BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

Result BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultо‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultAllow BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResult = "allow"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResultDeny BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventResult = "deny"о‚љ

ToolUseID stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventTypeо‚љ

DenyMessage stringо‚љOptional

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

type BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Input map[string, any]о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

Name stringо‚љ

Name of the custom tool being called.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEventTypeо‚љ

SessionThreadID stringо‚љOptional

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

type BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

Error BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEventErrorUnionо‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

Message stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

RetryStatus BetaManagedAgentsUnknownErrorRetryStatusUnionо‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetryingTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhaustedTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminalTypeо‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsUnknownErrorTypeо‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Explanation stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

OutcomeEvaluationStartID stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Result stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

Usage [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

CacheCreationInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

CacheReadInputTokens int64о‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

InputTokens int64о‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

OutputTokens int64о‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

Speed BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedо‚љOptional

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedStandard BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "standard"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeedFast BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsageSpeed = "fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

One of the following:

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelRequestEndEventTypeо‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Iteration int64о‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEventTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

Description stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

MaxIterations int64о‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

OutcomeID stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

ProcessedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

Rubric BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEventRubricUnionо‚љ

Rubric for grading the quality of an outcome.

One of the following:

type BetaManagedAgentsModel stringо‚љ

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeFable5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-fable-5"о‚љ

Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_8 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-8"о‚љ

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_7 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-7"о‚љ

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_6 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-6"о‚љ

Most intelligent model for building agents and coding

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeSonnet4\_6 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-sonnet-4-6"о‚љ

Best combination of speed and intelligence

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeHaiku4\_5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-haiku-4-5"о‚љ

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeHaiku4\_5\_20251001 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"о‚љ

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-5"о‚љ

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeOpus4\_5\_20251101 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-opus-4-5-20251101"о‚љ

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeSonnet4\_5 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-sonnet-4-5"о‚љ

High-performance model for agents and coding

const BetaManagedAgentsModelClaudeSonnet4\_5\_20250929 BetaManagedAgentsModel = "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"о‚љ

High-performance model for agents and coding

stringо‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigSpeedStandard BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigSpeed = "standard"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigSpeedFast BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigSpeed = "fast"о‚љ

Name stringо‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsCronSchedule struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

Expression stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

Timezone stringо‚љ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

Type BetaManagedAgentsCronScheduleTypeо‚љ

LastRunAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

UpcomingRunsAt []Timeо‚љOptional

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsCronScheduleParamsResp struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule. Literal wall-clock matching in the configured timezone.

Expression stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

Timezone stringо‚љ

Required. IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC"). Validated against the IANA timezone database.

Type BetaManagedAgentsCronScheduleParamsTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

A GitHub repository mounted into each session's container. The authorization token is write-only and never returned.

Type BetaManagedAgentsGitHubRepositoryResourceConfigTypeо‚љ

URL stringо‚љ

Github URL of the repository

оЂЄ

Checkout BetaManagedAgentsGitHubRepositoryResourceConfigCheckoutUnionо‚љOptional

Branch or commit to check out. Defaults to the repository's default branch.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsBranchCheckout struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Name stringо‚љ

Branch name to check out.

Type BetaManagedAgentsBranchCheckoutTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsCommitCheckout struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Sha stringо‚љ

Full commit SHA to check out.

Type BetaManagedAgentsCommitCheckoutTypeо‚љ

MountPath stringо‚љOptional

Mount path in the container. Defaults to `/workspace/<repo-name>`.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsFileResourceConfig struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A file mounted into each session's container.

FileID stringо‚љ

ID of a previously uploaded file.

Type BetaManagedAgentsFileResourceConfigTypeо‚љ

MountPath stringо‚љOptional

Mount path in the container. Defaults to `/mnt/session/uploads/<file_id>`.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfig struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A memory store attached to each session created from this deployment.

MemoryStoreID stringо‚љ

The memory store ID (memstore\_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.

Type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfigTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

Access BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfigAccessо‚љOptional

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfigAccessReadWrite BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfigAccess = "read\_write"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfigAccessReadOnly BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfigAccess = "read\_only"о‚љ

Instructions stringо‚љOptional

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

оЂЄ

Schedule [BetaManagedAgentsSchedule](api/beta.md)о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

Expression stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

Timezone stringо‚љ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

Type BetaManagedAgentsScheduleTypeо‚љ

LastRunAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

UpcomingRunsAt []Timeо‚љOptional

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оЂЄ

Status [BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentStatus](api/beta.md)о‚љ

Lifecycle status of a deployment.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentStatusActive [BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentStatus](api/beta.md) = "active"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentStatusPaused [BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentStatus](api/beta.md) = "paused"о‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentTypeо‚љ

UpdatedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

VaultIDs []stringо‚љ

Vault IDs supplying stored credentials for sessions created from this deployment.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParamsResp struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

Text stringо‚љ

The text content.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlockTypeо‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParamsTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSchedule struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

Expression stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

Timezone stringо‚љ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

Type BetaManagedAgentsScheduleTypeо‚љ

LastRunAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

UpcomingRunsAt []Timeо‚љOptional

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsScheduleParamsResp struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule. Literal wall-clock matching in the configured timezone.

Expression stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

Timezone stringо‚љ

Required. IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC"). Validated against the IANA timezone database.

Type BetaManagedAgentsScheduleParamsTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUnrestrictedCredentialNetworkingParamsResp struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsLimitedCredentialNetworkingParamsResp struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Substitute the secret only on requests to the listed hosts.

AllowedHosts []stringо‚љ

Hostnames on which the secret will be substituted. Each entry is a bare hostname (`api.example.com`), an IPv4 address (`192.0.2.1`), or a `*.`-prefixed wildcard (`*.example.com`). URLs, ports, paths, and IPv6 addresses are not accepted. At most 16 entries.

Type BetaManagedAgentsLimitedCredentialNetworkingParamsTypeо‚љ

Unique identifier of the credential that was validated.

HasRefreshToken boolо‚љ

An HTTP response captured during a credential validation probe.

Response body. May be truncated and has sensitive values scrubbed.

Whether `body` was truncated.

ContentType stringо‚љ

Value of the `Content-Type` response header.

StatusCode int64о‚љ

HTTP status code.

Method stringо‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsDeletedMemoryStore struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Confirmation that a `memory_store` was deleted.

ID stringо‚љ

ID of the deleted memory store (a `memstore_...` identifier). The store and all its memories and versions are no longer retrievable.

Type BetaManagedAgentsDeletedMemoryStoreTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStore struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A `memory_store`: a named container for agent memories, scoped to a workspace. Attach a store to a session via `resources[]` to mount it as a directory the agent can read and write.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for the memory store (a `memstore_...` tagged ID). Use this when attaching the store to a session, or in the `{memory_store_id}` path parameter of subsequent calls.

CreatedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Name stringо‚љ

Human-readable name for the store. 1вЂ“255 characters. The store's mount-path slug under `/mnt/memory/` is derived from this name.

Type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreTypeо‚љ

UpdatedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ArchivedAt Timeо‚љOptional

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Description stringо‚љOptional

Free-text description of what the store contains, up to 1024 characters. Included in the agent's system prompt when the store is attached, so word it to be useful to the agent. Empty string when unset.

Metadata map[string, string]о‚љOptional

Arbitrary key-value tags for your own bookkeeping (such as the end user a store belongs to). Up to 16 pairs; keys 1вЂ“64 characters; values up to 512 characters. Returned on retrieve/list but not filterable.

type BetaManagedAgentsConflictError struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsConflictErrorTypeо‚љ

Message stringо‚љOptional

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsContentSha256Precondition struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Optimistic-concurrency precondition: the update applies only if the memory's stored `content_sha256` equals the supplied value. On mismatch, the request returns `memory_precondition_failed_error` (HTTP 409); re-read the memory and retry against the fresh state. If the precondition fails but the stored state already exactly matches the requested `content` and `path`, the server returns 200 instead of 409.

Type BetaManagedAgentsContentSha256PreconditionTypeо‚љ

ContentSha256 stringо‚љOptional

Expected `content_sha256` of the stored memory (64 lowercase hexadecimal characters). Typically the `content_sha256` returned by a prior read or list call. Because the server applies no content normalization, clients can also compute this locally as the SHA-256 of the UTF-8 content bytes.

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsDeletedMemory struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Tombstone returned by [Delete a memory](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/delete.md). The memory's version history persists and remains listable via [List memory versions](api/beta/memory_stores/memory_versions/list.md) until the store itself is deleted.

ID stringо‚љ

ID of the deleted memory (a `mem_...` value).

Type BetaManagedAgentsDeletedMemoryTypeо‚љ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemory struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A `memory` object: a single text document at a hierarchical path inside a memory store. The `content` field is populated when `view=full` and `null` when `view=basic`; the `content_size_bytes` and `content_sha256` fields are always populated so sync clients can diff without fetching content. Memories are addressed by their `mem_...` ID; the path is the create key and can be changed via update.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this memory (a `mem_...` value). Stable across renames; use this ID, not the path, to read, update, or delete the memory.

ContentSha256 stringо‚љ

Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the UTF-8 `content` bytes (64 characters). The server applies no normalization, so clients can compute the same hash locally for staleness checks and as the value for a `content_sha256` precondition on update. Always populated, regardless of `view`.

ContentSizeBytes int64о‚љ

Size of `content` in bytes (the UTF-8 plaintext length). Always populated, regardless of `view`.

CreatedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

MemoryStoreID stringо‚љ

ID of the memory store this memory belongs to (a `memstore_...` value).

MemoryVersionID stringо‚љ

ID of the `memory_version` representing this memory's current content (a `memver_...` value). This is the authoritative head pointer; `memory_version` objects do not carry an `is_latest` flag, so compare against this field instead. Enumerate the full history via [List memory versions](api/beta/memory_stores/memory_versions/list.md).

Path stringо‚љ

Hierarchical path of the memory within the store, e.g. `/projects/foo/notes.md`. Always starts with `/`. Paths are case-sensitive and unique within a store. Maximum 1,024 bytes.

Type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryTypeо‚љ

UpdatedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Content stringо‚љOptional

The memory's UTF-8 text content. Populated when `view=full`; `null` when `view=basic`. Maximum 100 kB (102,400 bytes).

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryListItemUnion interface{вЂ¦}о‚љ

One item in a [List memories](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/list.md) response: either a `memory` object or, when `depth` is set, a `memory_prefix` rollup marker.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemory struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A `memory` object: a single text document at a hierarchical path inside a memory store. The `content` field is populated when `view=full` and `null` when `view=basic`; the `content_size_bytes` and `content_sha256` fields are always populated so sync clients can diff without fetching content. Memories are addressed by their `mem_...` ID; the path is the create key and can be changed via update.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this memory (a `mem_...` value). Stable across renames; use this ID, not the path, to read, update, or delete the memory.

ContentSha256 stringо‚љ

Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the UTF-8 `content` bytes (64 characters). The server applies no normalization, so clients can compute the same hash locally for staleness checks and as the value for a `content_sha256` precondition on update. Always populated, regardless of `view`.

ContentSizeBytes int64о‚љ

Size of `content` in bytes (the UTF-8 plaintext length). Always populated, regardless of `view`.

CreatedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

MemoryStoreID stringо‚љ

ID of the memory store this memory belongs to (a `memstore_...` value).

MemoryVersionID stringо‚љ

ID of the `memory_version` representing this memory's current content (a `memver_...` value). This is the authoritative head pointer; `memory_version` objects do not carry an `is_latest` flag, so compare against this field instead. Enumerate the full history via [List memory versions](api/beta/memory_stores/memory_versions/list.md).

Path stringо‚љ

Hierarchical path of the memory within the store, e.g. `/projects/foo/notes.md`. Always starts with `/`. Paths are case-sensitive and unique within a store. Maximum 1,024 bytes.

Type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryTypeо‚љ

UpdatedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Content stringо‚љOptional

The memory's UTF-8 text content. Populated when `view=full`; `null` when `view=basic`. Maximum 100 kB (102,400 bytes).

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPrefix struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A rolled-up directory marker returned by [List memories](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/list.md) when `depth` is set. Indicates that one or more memories exist deeper than the requested depth under this prefix. This is a list-time rollup, not a stored resource; it has no ID and no lifecycle. Each prefix counts toward the page `limit` and interleaves with `memory` items in path order.

Path stringо‚љ

The rolled-up path prefix, including a trailing `/` (e.g. `/projects/foo/`). Pass this value as `path_prefix` on a subsequent list call to drill into the directory.

Type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPrefixTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPathConflictError struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPathConflictErrorTypeо‚љ

ConflictingMemoryID stringо‚љOptional

ConflictingPath stringо‚љOptional

Message stringо‚љOptional

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPreconditionFailedError struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPreconditionFailedErrorTypeо‚љ

Message stringо‚љOptional

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPrefix struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A rolled-up directory marker returned by [List memories](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/list.md) when `depth` is set. Indicates that one or more memories exist deeper than the requested depth under this prefix. This is a list-time rollup, not a stored resource; it has no ID and no lifecycle. Each prefix counts toward the page `limit` and interleaves with `memory` items in path order.

Path stringо‚љ

The rolled-up path prefix, including a trailing `/` (e.g. `/projects/foo/`). Pass this value as `path_prefix` on a subsequent list call to drill into the directory.

Type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPrefixTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryView stringо‚љ

Selects which projection of a `memory` or `memory_version` the server returns. `basic` returns the object with `content` set to `null`; `full` populates `content`. When omitted, the default is endpoint-specific: retrieve operations default to `full`; list, create, and update operations default to `basic`. Listing with `view=full` caps `limit` at 20.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryViewBasic [BetaManagedAgentsMemoryView](api/beta.md) = "basic"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryViewFull [BetaManagedAgentsMemoryView](api/beta.md) = "full"о‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsPrecondition struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Optimistic-concurrency precondition: the update applies only if the memory's stored `content_sha256` equals the supplied value. On mismatch, the request returns `memory_precondition_failed_error` (HTTP 409); re-read the memory and retry against the fresh state. If the precondition fails but the stored state already exactly matches the requested `content` and `path`, the server returns 200 instead of 409.

Type BetaManagedAgentsPreconditionTypeо‚љ

ContentSha256 stringо‚љOptional

Expected `content_sha256` of the stored memory (64 lowercase hexadecimal characters). Typically the `content_sha256` returned by a prior read or list call. Because the server applies no content normalization, clients can also compute this locally as the SHA-256 of the UTF-8 content bytes.

type BetaManagedAgentsActorUnion interface{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Identifies who performed a write or redact operation. Captured at write time on the `memory_version` row. The API key that created a session is not recorded on agent writes; attribution answers who made the write, not who is ultimately responsible. Look up session provenance separately via the [Sessions API](api/sessions-retrieve.md).

One of the following:

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSessionActor struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Attribution for a write made by an agent during a session, through the mounted filesystem at `/mnt/memory/`.

SessionID stringо‚љ

ID of the session that performed the write (a `sesn_...` value). Look up the session via [Retrieve a session](api/sessions-retrieve.md) for further provenance.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSessionActorTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsAPIActor struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Attribution for a write made directly via the public API (outside of any session).

APIKeyID stringо‚љ

ID of the API key that performed the write. This identifies the key, not the secret.

Type BetaManagedAgentsAPIActorTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserActor struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Attribution for a write made by a human user through the Anthropic Console.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUserActorTypeо‚љ

UserID stringо‚љ

ID of the user who performed the write (a `user_...` value).

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsAPIActor struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Attribution for a write made directly via the public API (outside of any session).

APIKeyID stringо‚љ

ID of the API key that performed the write. This identifies the key, not the secret.

Type BetaManagedAgentsAPIActorTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersion struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

A `memory_version` object: one immutable, attributed row in a memory's append-only history. Every non-no-op mutation to a memory produces a new version. Versions belong to the store (not the individual memory) and persist after the memory is deleted. Retrieving a redacted version returns 200 with `content`, `path`, `content_size_bytes`, and `content_sha256` set to `null`; branch on `redacted_at`, not HTTP status.

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this version (a `memver_...` value).

CreatedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

MemoryID stringо‚љ

ID of the memory this version snapshots (a `mem_...` value). Remains valid after the memory is deleted; pass it as `memory_id` to [List memory versions](api/beta/memory_stores/memory_versions/list.md) to retrieve the full lineage including the `deleted` row.

MemoryStoreID stringо‚љ

ID of the memory store this version belongs to (a `memstore_...` value).

оЂЄ

Operation [BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperation](api/beta.md)о‚љ

The kind of mutation a `memory_version` records. Every non-no-op mutation to a memory appends exactly one version row with one of these values.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperationCreated [BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperation](api/beta.md) = "created"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperationModified [BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperation](api/beta.md) = "modified"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperationDeleted [BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperation](api/beta.md) = "deleted"о‚љ

Type BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionTypeо‚љ

Content stringо‚љOptional

The memory's UTF-8 text content as of this version. `null` when `view=basic`, when `operation` is `deleted`, or when `redacted_at` is set.

ContentSha256 stringо‚љOptional

Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of `content` as of this version (64 characters). `null` when `redacted_at` is set or `operation` is `deleted`. Populated regardless of `view` otherwise.

ContentSizeBytes int64о‚љOptional

Size of `content` in bytes as of this version. `null` when `redacted_at` is set or `operation` is `deleted`. Populated regardless of `view` otherwise.

оЂЄ

CreatedBy [BetaManagedAgentsActorUnion](api/beta.md)о‚љOptional

Identifies who performed a write or redact operation. Captured at write time on the `memory_version` row. The API key that created a session is not recorded on agent writes; attribution answers who made the write, not who is ultimately responsible. Look up session provenance separately via the [Sessions API](api/sessions-retrieve.md).

One of the following:
