The kind of mutation a `memory_version` records. Every non-no-op mutation to a memory appends exactly one version row with one of these values.

One of the following:

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperationCreated [BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperation](api/beta.md) = "created"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperationModified [BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperation](api/beta.md) = "modified"о‚љ

const BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperationDeleted [BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperation](api/beta.md) = "deleted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsSessionActor struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Attribution for a write made by an agent during a session, through the mounted filesystem at `/mnt/memory/`.

SessionID stringо‚љ

ID of the session that performed the write (a `sesn_...` value). Look up the session via [Retrieve a session](api/sessions-retrieve.md) for further provenance.

Type BetaManagedAgentsSessionActorTypeо‚љ

оЂЄ

type BetaManagedAgentsUserActor struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

Attribution for a write made by a human user through the Anthropic Console.

Type BetaManagedAgentsUserActorTypeо‚љ

UserID stringо‚љ

ID of the user who performed the write (a `user_...` value).

#### BetaFiles

##### [Upload File](api/beta/files/upload.md)

client.Beta.Files.Upload(ctx, params) (\*[FileMetadata](api/beta.md), error)

POST/v1/files

##### [List Files](api/beta/files/list.md)

client.Beta.Files.List(ctx, params) (\*Page[[FileMetadata](api/beta.md)], error)

GET/v1/files

##### [Download File](api/beta/files/download.md)

GET/v1/files/{file\_id}/content

##### [Get File Metadata](api/beta/files/retrieve_metadata.md)

client.Beta.Files.GetMetadata(ctx, fileID, query) (\*[FileMetadata](api/beta.md), error)

GET/v1/files/{file\_id}

##### [Delete File](api/beta/files/delete.md)

client.Beta.Files.Delete(ctx, fileID, body) (\*[DeletedFile](api/beta.md), error)

DELETE/v1/files/{file\_id}

type BetaFileScope struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

ID stringо‚љ

type DeletedFile struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

ID stringо‚љ

ID of the deleted file.

оЂЄ

Type DeletedFileTypeо‚љOptional

оЂЄ

type FileMetadata struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

оЂЄ

ID stringо‚љ

Unique object identifier.

The format and length of IDs may change over time.

CreatedAt Timeо‚љ

RFC 3339 datetime string representing when the file was created.

Filename stringо‚љ

Original filename of the uploaded file.

MimeType stringо‚љ

MIME type of the file.

SizeBytes int64о‚љ

Size of the file in bytes.

оЂЄ

Type Fileо‚љ

Object type.

For files, this is always `"file"`.

Downloadable boolо‚љOptional

Whether the file can be downloaded.

оЂЄ

Scope [BetaFileScope](api/beta.md)о‚љOptional

The scope of this file, indicating the context in which it was created (e.g., a session).

ID stringо‚љ

The ID of the scoping resource (e.g., the session ID).

Type Sessionо‚љ

The type of scope (e.g., `"session"`).

##### ModelsExpand Collapse

оЂЄ

type BetaUserProfile struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

ID stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this user profile, prefixed `uprof_`.

CreatedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Metadata map[string, string]о‚љ

Arbitrary key-value metadata. Maximum 16 pairs, keys up to 64 chars, values up to 512 chars.

оЂЄ

Relationship BetaUserProfileRelationshipо‚љ

How the entity behind a user profile relates to the platform that owns the API key. `external`: an individual end-user of the platform. `resold`: a company the platform resells Claude access to. `internal`: the platform's own usage.

One of the following:

const BetaUserProfileRelationshipExternal BetaUserProfileRelationship = "external"о‚љ

const BetaUserProfileRelationshipResold BetaUserProfileRelationship = "resold"о‚љ

const BetaUserProfileRelationshipInternal BetaUserProfileRelationship = "internal"о‚љ

оЂЄ

TrustGrants map[string, [BetaUserProfileTrustGrant](api/beta.md)]о‚љ

Trust grants for this profile, keyed by grant name. Key omitted when no grant is active or in flight.

оЂЄ

Status BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatusо‚љ

Status of the trust grant.

One of the following:

const BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatusActive BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatus = "active"о‚љ

const BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatusPending BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatus = "pending"о‚љ

const BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatusRejected BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatus = "rejected"о‚љ

Type BetaUserProfileTypeо‚љ

Object type. Always `user_profile`.

UpdatedAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ExternalID stringо‚љOptional

Platform's own identifier for this user. Not enforced unique.

Name stringо‚љOptional

Display name of the entity this profile represents. For `resold` this is the resold-to company's name.

оЂЄ

type BetaUserProfileEnrollmentURL struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

ExpiresAt Timeо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type BetaUserProfileEnrollmentURLTypeо‚љ

Object type. Always `enrollment_url`.

URL stringо‚љ

Enrollment URL to send to the end user. Valid until `expires_at`.

оЂЄ

type BetaUserProfileTrustGrant struct{вЂ¦}о‚љ

оЂЄ

Status BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatusо‚љ

Status of the trust grant.

One of the following:

const BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatusActive BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatus = "active"о‚љ

const BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatusPending BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatus = "pending"о‚љ

const BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatusRejected BetaUserProfileTrustGrantStatus = "rejected"о‚љ

#### BetaWebhooks

Helpers for receiving and verifying webhook events. Use `unwrap` in your SDK to verify signatures and parse payloads; see the [webhooks guide](managed-agents/webhooks.md) for handler examples.

Possible `data.type` values:

- `session.archived`
- `session.created`
- `session.deleted`
- `session.idled`
- `session.outcome_evaluation_ended`
- `session.pending`
- `session.requires_action`
- `session.running`
- `session.status_idled`
- `session.status_rescheduled`
- `session.status_run_started`
- `session.status_terminated`
- `session.thread_created`
- `session.thread_idled`
- `session.thread_terminated`
- `vault.archived`
- `vault.created`
- `vault.deleted`
- `vault_credential.archived`
- `vault_credential.created`
- `vault_credential.deleted`
- `vault_credential.refresh_failed`

##### ModelsExpand Collapse

RFC 3339 timestamp when the event occurred.
